case_title: ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. HECTOR CARDOZA et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA, HECTOR DOESA 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-20-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-21-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-05-2006
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED OCT-21-2005, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA, HECTOR
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $353.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA, HECTOR
DECLARATION OF DALE G. MAJOR IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF COURT DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOESA 1 TO 10

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-01-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-20-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT-A-CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDOZA, HECTOR $19,252.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,275.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $5,205.89 INTEREST, $353.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $27,086.39, SEE SCANNED DOC
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
